'''Briff''' was a licensed [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and [[black marketeer]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Ord Mantell system]].

==Biography==
Briff was [[Czethros]]'s henchman during the [[Human/Legends|Human's]] early career as a bounty hunter. As such, Briff was sent to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] along with Czethros after [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] framed the bounty hunter in an effort to rescue [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. In the years after their release from Kessel, Briff continued to work for Czethros as an assistant.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Return to Ord Mantell]]'' {{1stm}}
